description: This pipeline detects lines in an image and outputs a binary mask, which is then smoothed using a Gaussian filter to reduce noise and detail, resulting in a processed image where detected lines are highlighted.

561e5bb0-edc2-43d3-8d9c-28ca273b84a5.name: ij1-segment-ridge-detector-2d
561e5bb0-edc2-43d3-8d9c-28ca273b84a5.description: A ridge detector that detects lines and outputs a binary mask where lines are detected.

39fadc76-5f18-4e37-b33c-22af200f3a6e.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
39fadc76-5f18-4e37-b33c-22af200f3a6e.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
